title: Saabsa Solutions Welcomes ForgeMeter to Its Product Portfolio
excerpt: Saabsa Solutions now owns ForgeMeter—the AI engineering spend dashboard that unifies Cursor, Copilot, and Claude usage for engineering leaders who need cost visibility and ROI proof.
bodyHtml:
Saabsa Solutions is expanding its product portfolio with ForgeMeter, an AI engineering intelligence platform that helps CTOs and engineering leaders understand where their AI development budget goes—and how to optimize it.

Why ForgeMeter fits the Saabsa portfolio

Saabsa already builds production SaaS across healthcare (Patientree AI), data infrastructure (DataXPipe), and consumer legal tech (Lease Exit). ForgeMeter adds a fourth pillar: developer tooling for the AI era.

As teams adopt Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Claude Code simultaneously, finance and engineering rarely share one view of spend. ForgeMeter closes that gap with official API integrations—no request interception, no source code storage—delivering unified dashboards, AI-powered summaries, and budget alerts in minutes.

What ForgeMeter delivers

  • Unified cost tracking across Cursor, Copilot, OpenAI, and Anthropic
  • Per-developer and per-repo analytics to spot adoption gaps and power users
  • AI-generated insights with model routing recommendations that can cut spend by ~30%
  • Governance controls including team budgets, allowlists, and anomaly detection

What's next

ForgeMeter continues at forgemeter.com with early access, a live demo, and Team/Pro plans for growing engineering organizations. Saabsa will invest in integrations, enterprise governance, and the design partner program outlined on the ForgeMeter site.

Interested in early access or a design partnership? Join the ForgeMeter waitlist or contact Saabsa Solutions.
